name: Hot Chocolate
recipeIngredient: A small amount of heated milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the evaporated skimmed milk (or half evaporated and half skimmed) into a microwave-safe container.
2. Microwave for under 1 minute until hot and fragrant, but do not boil.
3. Add cocoa and sugar to your cup in which you will drink the hot chocolate, mixing well.
4. Stir in a small amount of the heated milk to create a slurry.
5. Using a hand blender or Braun aerating blender, beat the remaining milk until frothy.
6. If using a good aerating blender, it can approximate steamed milk.
7. Add the frothy milk to the chocolate slurry and blend well.
8. Drink immediately.
Additions:
- A splash of vanilla or brandy enhances the flavor.
- Butterscotch Schnapps adds an extra special touch.
